data.title: March 2026 Monthly Release
data.description: Northbrook, Illinois-based Allstate Corporation (NYSE: ALL) disclosed a prediction of $925 million in catastrophe losses for March 2026, equating to $731 million after tax. These losses stem from 15 wind and hail incidents, with about 80% attributed to three major events.

data.title: BIO-key Expects 50% Increase in First Half Revenues, Driving Profitability in the Period
data.description: BIO-key provided a glimpse of its projected financial performance for the first half of 2026, anticipating a significant 50% surge in revenues compared to the previous period. This growth is forecasted to contribute to the company achieving positive profitability during the same timeframe.
Decibel Reports Full-Year and Fourth Quarter 2025 Results: Revenue Grows 22% to $113 Million, Issues 2026 Guidance
Prologis Reports First Quarter 2026 Results

data.title: Quantum Responds to Industry-Wide Supply Chain and Power Disruption Ahead of NAB 2026
data.description: In Centennial, Colorado, Quantum Corporation (Nasdaq: QMCO) emphasized its offerings tailored to tackle AI-powered supply chain and power issues triggered by rising expenses, limited availability, and uncertainty in flash and hard disk technologies. Prior to the 2026 NAB Show, Quantum is unveiling "shockproof workflows," structures aimed at alleviating these vulnerabilities. These solutions provide options to combat energy limitations and reduce storage costs, addressing critical challenges in the industry.
Atlantic International Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results

data.title: WEX Files Investor Presentation Highlighting Clear Path to Shareholder Value Creation and Refreshed Board
data.description: WEX, a renowned global provider of intelligent payment solutions, disclosed that it lodged an investor presentation with the SEC for the impending 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders set for May 5, 2026. This filing showcases the company’s enhanced performance, robust operational capabilities, and a definitive strategy focused on generating value. Interested parties can access the presentation on their website.
Thomasville Bancshares, Inc. Announces Earnings, Cash Dividend, and Stock Repurchase Program

data.title: Horizon3.ai Accelerates Channel Investment at Global Partner Conference: Americas
data.description: Horizon3.ai, a leading proactive security company specializing in AI technology, revealed increased investment in its worldwide partner network during its Global Partner Conference: Americas. This move underscores a strategic focus on partner-driven expansion and enhanced delivery of offensive security solutions. The conference, now in its second year, gathered over 100 partners in Orlando, Florida, highlighting significant traction within the channel. Partners play a vital role in the company's growth, accounting for 32% of its overall success.

data.title: Media Advisory: Air Canada to Present First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Montreal on April 16, 2026, Air Canada's top executives Michael Rousseau, John Di Bert, and Mark Galardo will conduct a conference call at 5:00 PM ET on April 30, 2026. The call aims to discuss the first quarter results of 2026 with analysts and address their inquiries. Post the analyst session, John Di Bert and Pierre Houle will entertain questions from Air Canada's term loan B lenders and bond holders. Additionally, Media and public disclosure of the results will be made following the call. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Mega Matrix Announces Fiscal 2025 Annual Results on Form 20-F: Dual-Engine Strategy Delivers Operational Efficiency, Margin Improvement and Strategic Web3 Growth
data.description: On April 16, 2026, Mega Matrix Inc. ("MPU" or the "Company"), a leading global short-drama streaming platform operator and digital asset treasury strategy firm, released its annual report for the fiscal year ending on December 31. The company, listed on NYSE American under the ticker symbol MPU, detailed its financial performance and strategic initiatives for the year. This announcement marks a significant update for investors and stakeholders, providing insights into MPU's operations and achievements.

data.title: UK starts process for crypto regulation; FCA seeks input on crypto rules for October 2027. #UKcrypto #FCA #regulation
data.description: The regulatory body is inviting comments on its understanding of controlled cryptocurrency operations as per regulations scheduled to be implemented in October 2027.

data.title: Zeto Introduces NeuroNotis™: An AI-Enabled Report with Human Review
data.description: Zeto, Inc. unveiled NeuroNotis™ on April 16, 2026, in Raleigh, North Carolina. The innovation combines AI seizure detection with expert technical review to enhance clinical decision-making for hospital clients. This new offering aims to provide increased confidence in diagnoses and treatment plans.

data.title: SUIT UP AND SCORE: CHIPOTLE BRINGS BACK ITS HOCKEY JERSEY BOGO FOR THE 2026 STANLEY CUP® PLAYOFFS--AND DROPS FIRST-EVER LIMITED-EDITION JERSEY
data.description: On April 20th, fans can enjoy a special promotion at Chipotle by wearing a hockey jersey; they will receive a BUY-ONE-GET-ONE (BOGO) deal on entrées after 3 p.m. local time. Chipotle is also releasing its inaugural limited-edition hockey jersey, with just 75 jerseys up for grabs exclusively through the Chipotle Rewards Exchange platform. This news was announced from Chipotle's headquarters in Newport Beach, California on April 16, 2026.

data.title: MeiraGTx Announces Pricing of $100 Million Offering of Ordinary Shares
data.description: London and New York, April 16, 2026 - MeiraGTx Holdings plc (Nasdaq: MGTX), a genetic medicines company in the clinical stage, revealed the pricing details of an underwritten offering comprising 11,111,111 ordinary shares at a rate of $9.00 per share. The offering is anticipated to generate approximately $100 million in gross proceeds for MeiraGTx, excluding underwriting discounts, commissions, and offering costs. All ordinary shares in this offering are being sold by MeiraGTx.

data.title: Circle CEO Flags 'Tremendous Opportunity' For Yuan Stablecoin
data.description: Jeremy Allaire, CEO of Circle Internet Group (NYSE: CRCL), recently stated that China may introduce a yuan-backed stablecoin within the next three to five years, describing this development as a significant opportunity for digital money to become more integrated into global trade. This initiative aligns with China's objective of expanding the yuan's influence in the global financial system. The use of stablecoins has emerged as a method for promoting a currency internationally by facilitating global payments. Allaire emphasized the potential of a yuan stablecoin, highlighting the importance of features and technological advancements in currency competition. Reports from Reuters last August suggested that China was contemplating the creation of a yuan-backed stablecoin to enhance the adoption of its currency worldwide. If implemented, this move would represent a notable shift in China's stance on digital assets following the country's bans on cryptocurrency trading and mining in 2021. For more details, refer to the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: George Weston Limited pledges $600M investment in Choice Properties REIT for acquisition from First Capital REIT.
data.description: The latest statistics reveal that the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.8%, marking a decrease of 0.5% compared to the previous month. This decrease amounts to 150,000 fewer unemployed individuals in the workforce. Additionally, the economy has added 300,000 new jobs in various sectors, indicating a positive trend towards recovery. These numbers showcase a promising outlook for the job market and overall economic growth in the coming months.

data.title: LIV Golf's failure despite Saudi funding shows limits to country's influence in sports, affecting their big investment.
data.description: Saudi Arabia invested significant funding into a new golf circuit, but ultimately it was unsuccessful in overtaking the sport. The closure of the circuit underscores the constraints on the country's financial investment in sports.

data.title: BingX Renews Chelsea FC Partnership, Bolstering Leadership in Global Sports Strategy
data.description: On April 16, 2026, in Panama City, BingX, a prominent cryptocurrency exchange and Web3-AI firm, revealed the extension of its collaboration with Chelsea FC. This move solidifies BingX's standing as a frontrunner in sports partnerships globally. The renewed partnership underscores BingX's commitment to strategic alliances in the sports sector, particularly evident in their long-standing association with Chelsea FC. This collaboration has been instrumental in the mutual growth and success of both parties involved.

data.title: Fratarcangeli Wealth Management CEO Ranked No. 1 in the Michigan - Detroit area on Forbes' Best-In-State Wealth Advisors
data.description: Today, Fratarcangeli Wealth Management revealed that its founder and CEO, Jeffrey Fratarcangeli, has been recognized as one of the top 250 wealth advisors in the United States. The firm, based in Bloomfield Hills, Michigan, caters to high-net-worth individuals. This announcement was made on April 16, 2026.
